title: Tala Reusable Silicone Watermelon Shaped Lolly Mould with Lolly Stick, Made with Food Grade BPA Free Silicone, Perfect for Homemade Popsicles, Novelty Cake Pops and Natural Baby Soothers (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE: Ideal for creating not just ice lollies, but also fruit-based popsicles, yogurt pops, or even mini frozen desserts. Great for experimenting with different flavours
MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free plastic to ensure that your treats are safe, while the mould remains durable for long-lasting use
DESIGN: Add a fun and fruity twist to your frozen treats with this playful watermelon shape, perfect for summer parties, picnics, or simply enjoying a refreshing snack
EASY TO USE: Simply fill the moulds with your favourite juice, smoothie, or flavoured water, freeze, and enjoy homemade ice lollies that are both delicious and visually fun
EASY TO CLEAN: The non-stick silicone surface ensures easy release of your treats, and the mould is dishwasher safe for a quick and hassle-free clean-up, making it perfect for repeated use
